zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行结构
zh.content:
当前价格位于6.53附近并站上SMA20均线6.27上方，短线维持震荡上行格局。24小时涨幅2.83%显示多头占优但力度有限，价格逼近前高6.55区域，整体处于修复性上涨阶段。

MACD数值为0.0546保持在零轴上方，动能略偏多但未形成强势扩张，RSI缺失使超买判断受限。当前走势更多体现为温和推升，缺乏趋势加速信号，需观察量能配合。

下方支撑关注6.32短期低点与6.27均线支撑，失守将回归震荡区间。上方阻力集中在6.55前高，突破后或打开至6.60空间，属于关键分界位，决定短线方向延续性。

操作上建议回踩6.32-6.27分批布局多单，止损放在6.27下方。若放量突破6.55可顺势追多，否则高位不宜追涨，等待区间回踩更具性价比的介入机会。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is showing a short-term recovery bias, currently trading at 6.5308 after a 2.83% daily gain. Price action has pushed above the 20-period SMA at 6.27556, indicating a potential shift from consolidation toward mild bullish momentum. The intraday range between 6.3223 and 6.547 reflects active participation from buyers, with higher lows forming as the market attempts to stabilize above the prior equilibrium zone. Overall structure leans upward in the near term.

MACD is positive at 0.0546, signaling strengthening upward momentum and suggesting early-stage bullish continuation. While the signal line is not provided, the positive histogram value still implies improving trend strength. In the absence of RSI data, price behavior becomes the primary guide, and trading above the SMA20 reinforces a constructive setup. Momentum is present but not extreme, indicating room for further upside if volume remains supportive.

Immediate support is established at 6.32, aligned with the session low, followed by stronger structural support around 6.275 at the SMA20. A breakdown below this region would weaken the bullish structure and expose downside risk toward 6.10. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at 6.547, the recent high, with a breakout potentially opening the path toward 6.65–6.70. The current price position near resistance signals a near-term inflection point.

From a trading perspective, dip buyers may look for entries between 6.32 and 6.28 with protective stops below 6.25 to manage downside risk. Breakout traders may prefer confirmation above 6.55 before initiating new long positions to avoid false moves. Given moderate momentum strength, scaling out into resistance zones is sensible, while trailing stops can help capture continuation if breakout momentum extends. Overall bias remains cautiously bullish while price holds above the SMA20.
